nodes.title: List Funds
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/funds with Authorization header. Returns array of funds with {id, name, fundType, accountId, currencyId, balances[]}. Fund types include: safe, bank, wallet, exchanger.

nodes.title: Get Fund Details
nodes.description: GET /api/funds/:id with Authorization header. Returns single fund {id, name, fundType, accountId, currencyId}. Returns 404 with {error: 'الصندوق غير موجود'} if not found.

nodes.title: Create Fund
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/funds with {name, fundType, accountId, currencyId}. Creates fund record linked to an account. Returns created fund object. Returns 400 if validation fails.

nodes.title: Update Fund
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/funds/:id with {name?, fundType?, accountId?, currencyId?}. Updates fund fields. Returns updated fund object.

nodes.title: Delete Fund
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/funds/:id. Removes fund and its balances. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}. Returns 404 if fund not found.
